name: standards-refresh.sh --force refreshes an entry regardless of freshness window
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r08-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

x

y

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml < .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/r08-src.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/reg.yaml --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --force --out-dir $OUT/out 2>e.err; grep -q 'total=1 processed=1 skipped=0' e.err && [ -f $OUT/out/us-government/r08-src.yaml ] && echo force-overrides-skip 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
